title: Marketing Executive
description:
Job Description

  • Assist in the planning and execution of integrated marketing campaigns, promotions, and product launches.

  • Develop creative content and manage the company’s social media platforms, website, and e-commerce channels.

  • Coordinate with external agencies, media partners, and internal teams to deliver marketing collaterals and campaigns on time.

  • Conduct market research, competitor analysis, and consumer insights to support marketing strategies.

  • Manage digital advertising, SEO/SEM, and email marketing activities to enhance online visibility and traffic.

  • Support in organizing events, exhibitions, and in-store activations.

  • Track and analyze campaign performance to measure effectiveness and ROI.

  • Ensure consistent brand messaging across all communication channels.

  • Perform other ad hoc marketing and administrative duties as assigned.

  • Strong understanding of digital marketing, social media, and branding principles.

  • Proficient in Microsoft Office and familiar with design and video editing tools such as Canva,Capcut,  Adobe Photoshop, or Illustrator .

  • Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

Job Requirements

  • Diploma or Degree in Marketing, Business, Communications, or related discipline.

  • Minimum 1–3 years of relevant marketing experience (retail or consumer goods industry preferred).

  • Photography and videography skill is a plus

  • Graphic design and video editing skill is a plus 

  • Hands-on, proactive, and willing to learn and explore new marketing ideas.

  • Creative, resourceful, and results-driven with strong attention to detail.

  • Able to work both independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced environment

postedCompany.description: Four Star is a home-grown brand that believes a good night’s sleep is never out of reach. Founded by furniture maker, Mr Neo Gim Sim, in 1968, we began as a humble outfit manufacturing mattresses by hand. For over 40 years since, we’ve dedicated ourselves to the mission of providing better rest at affordable price. We are trusted and approved by generations around the world, and have proudly grown with families to become a household name known for time-tested sleep solutions. Testament to our quality and comfort, Four Star has been the recipient of multiple international awards, including the prestigious International Arch of Europe Convention Award and the Golden American Award of Quality.
postedCompany.name: FOUR STAR INDUSTRIES PTE LTD
